tasks.title: Bootstrap web/ React + Vite project
tasks.description: Initialize the web/ frontend: `npm create vite@latest . -- --template react-ts`, install dependencies (GSAP, Three.js, react-router-dom, tailwindcss), configure Tailwind, set up bilingual i18n structure (Tamil + English), create basic folder structure: src/components/, src/pages/, src/animations/, src/data/, src/charts/. Add Makefile for web/ with PORT=4010. Ensure `make start` works from web/.
notes: Scaffolded manually: package.json, vite.config.ts, tsconfig.json, tsconfig.app.json, tsconfig.node.json, index.html.
Installed: gsap, three, @types/three, react-router-dom, tailwindcss, @tailwindcss/vite.
Tailwind configured via @tailwindcss/vite plugin in vite.config.ts.
Created all folders: src/components/, src/pages/, src/animations/, src/data/, src/charts/, src/i18n/.
Makefile created with PORT=4010, make start and make install targets.
Port 4010 assigned per project brief.
[Kavitha] PASS: All folders present, dependencies installed, Makefile correct, npm run build succeeds, type-check clean, lint clean.

tasks.title: Build Hero section — animated opening
tasks.description: Create the hero section of the homepage.
notes: Created src/components/HeroSection.tsx.
Full-screen hero with TVK colors: deep red #8B0000, gold #FFD700, dark background.
GSAP text reveal: headline letters fly in with stagger animation via timeline.
Three.js WebGL particle background: 600 particles (gold + red mixed) floating dynamically with sine-wave motion.
CTA button with gold gradient, hover scale animation, scrolls to stats section.
Mobile-first layout, works from 360px. Party name badge + scroll hint included.
Bilingual: updates headline font family based on active language (Noto Serif Tamil vs Inter).
[Kavitha] PASS: Component exists, imported in App.tsx, zero TS errors, build succeeds.

tasks.title: Build 'State of Tamil Nadu' statistics section
notes: Created src/components/StatsSection.tsx.

GSAP ScrollTrigger counter animation: numeric values count up from 0 on scroll enter.
Non-numeric values (6th/6வது) use scale-in animation instead.
Red accent bar at top of each card, gold source citation dots.
Tamil + English labels from i18n context, responsive 1→2→4 column grid.

tasks.title: Tamil Nadu governance data research
tasks.description: Research and compile authoritative data on Tamil Nadu governance failures 2021–2026.
notes: Assigned to Azhagan (analyst)
Azhagan: Starting research — roads, education, farmer welfare, corruption, politician assets, budget data.

Azhagan: COMPLETED. 5 knowledge files saved in .agents/analyst/knowledge/: tamil-nadu-roads-infrastructure.md, tamil-nadu-education-data.md, tamil-nadu-farmer-welfare.md, tamil-nadu-corruption-scams.md, tamil-nadu-state-finances-debt.md, tamil-nadu-politician-assets.md.

Key findings: Debt jumped 24%→28.83% GSDP under DMK. Secondary dropout 8.5% (UDISE+ 2024-25) reversing decade of progress. TASMAC ₹1000 cr scam (ED 2025). Sand mining ₹4700 cr scam (CBI ordered 2025). 728 farmer suicides 2022 (NCRB). Healthcare only 5% of budget vs 6.2% national avg. Education 13.7% vs 18% TVK target.
Data tasks created as task-011 for website data accuracy updates.

tasks.title: Update website components with verified research data
tasks.description: Update StatsSection.tsx and BeforeAfterSection.tsx with data verified by Azhagan's research. Key corrections: (1) School dropout stat: change '23% dropout' to '8.5% secondary dropout (UDISE+ 2024-25), decade of progress reversed'; (2) Farmer suicides: clarify '728 suicides in 2022 alone (NCRB)' vs 14,000+ cumulative; (3) State debt: add specific ₹8.33 lakh crore / 26.41% GSDP figure; (4) Education budget: update to '13.7% current vs 18% TVK target'; (5) Healthcare: add stat '5% of budget vs 6.2% national average'. Also update src/data/ with research-backed data files for chart components.
notes: All source data in .agents/analyst/knowledge/ directory. Assign to Muthu (developer).

Vignesh: COMPLETED. Updated en.ts and ta.ts: (1) dropout corrected to 8.5% (UDISE+ 2024-25), sublabel updated to reflect decade reversal; (2) farmer suicides corrected to 728 in 2022 alone (NCRB 2022), removed misleading 14,000+ figure; (3) state debt after-value updated to ₹8.33 lakh crore (26.41% GSDP) from PRS/RBI data; (4) education budget corrected to 13.7% (was 13.8%); (5) StatsSection.tsx numericValues fixed (dropout→0 for scale-in on 8.5%, farmers→728); (6) created web/src/data/tn-governance-data.ts with all research-backed figures. Zero TypeScript errors.

tasks.title: Build bilingual language toggle

Language context provided in src/Root.tsx, wraps entire App.
All 5 sections consume useLanguage() and re-render with correct strings on toggle.

tasks.title: Setup GitHub Pages deployment
tasks.description: Configure the web/ project for GitHub Pages deployment.
notes: Set base: '/namma-tvk/' in vite.config.ts for GitHub Pages asset paths.
Created .github/workflows/deploy.yml at module root: triggers on push to main when web/** changes, builds with Node 20, uploads dist/ as Pages artifact, deploys via actions/deploy-pages@v4.
Created web/public/404.html with SPA routing redirect script for GitHub Pages.
All assets use Vite's base-relative paths automatically.
[Kavitha] PASS: deploy.yml exists with correct trigger (push to main, web/** paths), base: '/namma-tvk/' set in vite.config.ts, 404.html present. Build artifact path is web/dist. Zero TS errors.
